calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo based upon an Appeal as to Judgment on Plaintiffs claim entered 1-17-2018 against Appellant/Defendant.

There were no appearances by any party and the trial date is vacated for the following reasons:

On May 16, 2018, the Honorable Ronald E. Quidachay signed an Order Consolidating the within Small Claims Action with Limited Jurisdiction Action No. CGC-18-565167 and orders the Small Claims Appeal date of May 16, 2018, vacated. (see scanned order in Case No. CGC-18-565167.

Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant; Clerk: D. Feinberg; Not Reported (525)
